data.title: The Heavy Duty Trucks market valued at USD 199.7 billion in 2025, expected to reach USD 342.4 billion in 2034 with 6.2% CAGR.
data.description: In Dublin, a report on the Heavy Duty Trucks Market has been released, now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The market, valued at USD 199.7 billion in 2025, is projected to see significant growth with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.2%. By 2034, global sales are estimated to reach USD 342.4 billion. The report analyzes market trends based on truck type (Rigid, Articulated), propulsion type (IC Engine, Electric, FCEV), and application. The Heavy Duty Trucks market is a crucial component of global logistics.

data.title: Rivian sets up East Coast HQ in Atlanta, to open in late 2025 and expand in 2026, part of their investment in Georgia.
data.description: An announcement was made today by Rivian, Georgia Governor Brian Kemp, and Atlanta Mayor Andre Dickens stating that the American electric vehicle company will be establishing a new East Coast Headquarters in Atlanta, Georgia as part of a significant investment in the state. The office is set to open by late 2025, with plans for additional expansion in 2026 as construction progresses at Rivian's new manufacturing location in Social Circle, located just outside the city. Rivian will be taking up the top floor and lobby of Portman.

data.title: BTS Bioenergy opens new Maryland organics recovery center to meet demand for food waste recycling, supporting circular economy.
data.description: Maryland's circular economy infrastructure receives a boost with the opening of a new facility in Annapolis on July 17, 2025. The facility, established by BTS Bioenergy, a prominent company in organic waste conversion and renewable energy infrastructure, aims to meet the increasing demand for food waste recycling. This development signifies a significant step towards sustainability, with the facility set to handle a substantial amount of organic waste to contribute to the state's environmental goals.

data.title: Resolver introduces advanced service for pinpointing unknown CSAM, providing top-notch identification and classification. Reach offered over multiple platforms worldwide.
data.description: A cutting-edge service has been launched that offers advanced capabilities for identifying and categorizing CSAM with extreme accuracy. This service is provided by Resolver, a Kroll business known as a top trust and safety intelligence provider worldwide. The service became available on July 17, 2025, in Leeds, United Kingdom. It allows platforms and services to access leading technology for recognizing and classifying CSAM content.

data.title: D-Wave's stock rises, leading quantum computing sector; D-Wave Q2 earnings expected in early August.
data.description: Stocks of D-Wave Quantum experienced a significant increase on Thursday, along with other quantum computing companies. The second-quarter earnings report for D-Wave is scheduled to be released in early August. This surge in quantum computing stocks, particularly led by D-Wave, has drawn the attention of investors.

data.title: Vertiv acquires Great Lakes Data Racks & Cabinets for $200 million, boosting AI data center offerings. Stock rises.
data.description: On Thursday, Vertiv revealed its plan to acquire Great Lakes Data Racks & Cabinets for $200 million, leading to a surge in Vertiv stock prices. This acquisition aims to enhance Vertiv's AI data center solutions.

data.title: Palantir stock rises to all-time high before Q2 earnings report, up over 100% in 2025.
data.description: On Thursday, the stock of Palantir reached a record high in anticipation of its second quarter earnings release on Aug. 4. Palantir's value has increased by more than 100% in 2025. The company's impressive performance was highlighted in an article titled "Palantir Hits New High Ahead Of Q2 Earnings Report" on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Uber announces robotaxi deal with Lucid, Nuro, but stock continues to fall for the seventh day in a row.
data.description: Despite revealing plans to introduce a new robotaxi service in collaboration with Lucid and Nuro, Uber's stock has declined for the seventh consecutive day. This new partnership with the Tesla competitor aims to revolutionize the transportation industry. However, Uber's stock has seen a continued decrease in value, indicating possible concerns among investors.

data.title: House advanced key crypto bills after over 9 hours of negotiation and Trump's intervention, potentially creating a U.S. shadow banking sector.
data.description: The House made progress on crucial crypto legislation by voting on Wednesday, following over 9 hours of discussions and with involvement from President Trump. This event raises the question: Could Congress be on the brink of establishing a shadow banking sector in the U.S.? The developments were covered in a post by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Atlas World Sports appoints Kevin Koeppel as Director of Product for leading Fantasy Sports expansion. Launching AtlasDFS.com.
data.description: In Chicago on July 17, 2025, Atlas World Sports, a swiftly expanding sports betting and fantasy sports platform, appointed Kevin Koeppel as its Director of Product. This move aligns with the company's upcoming launch of AtlasDFS.com under the Atlas World Sports label.
